groups.description: Borders that wraps around a container and separates it from its surroundings.

tokens.name: Divider base
tokens.description: A border that separate a page into heterogeneous sections or areas.

tokens.name: Divider soft
tokens.description: A border that separate homogenous sections or rows inside of a container.

groups.description: Use status borders for elements that convey status or urgency.

tokens.name: Danger border
tokens.description: The border for an elemant that conveys danger, error, or a critical warning.

tokens.name: Info border
tokens.description: The border for an element that contains important information, but conveys no danger.

tokens.name: Success border
tokens.description: The border for an element that conveys success or completion.

tokens.name: Warning border
tokens.description: The border for an element that conveys warning or caution.

groups.description: Add these in addition to border properties to modify the border width of certain elements.

tokens.name: Container base width
tokens.description: The width for borders that wrap around a container.

tokens.name: Divider base width
tokens.description: The width for borders that separate a page into heterogeneous sections or areas.

tokens.name: Divider soft width
tokens.description: The width for borders that separate homogenous sections or rows inside of a container.

tokens.name: Emphasized border width
tokens.description: The width to add emphasis to dividers or status borders.

tokens.name: Accent border width
tokens.description: The width to highlight an element with a status border in the visual hierarchy.

groups.description: Add these in addition to border properties to modify the border style of certain elements.

tokens.name: Divider base style
tokens.description: The style of a border that wraps around a container or separates a page into hetergeneous sections or areas.

tokens.name: Divider soft style
tokens.description: The style of a border the separates homogenous sections or rows inside of a container.

tokens.name: Accent border style
tokens.description: The style of a border that highlights an element with a status border in the visual hierarchy.

tokens.name: Border radius XS
tokens.description: The border radius for very small elements like tokens.

tokens.name: Border radius S
tokens.description: The border radius for most interactive elements like buttons.

tokens.name: Border radius M
tokens.description: The border radius for overlay containers like menus.

tokens.name: Pill border radius
tokens.description: The border radius for heavily rounded rectangles like labels.

tokens.name: Round border radius
tokens.description: The border radius for circular elements like avatars.
